SEARCH

Package mvc.model

package mvc.model
Package contains two classes Model and UnknownPhonogramException. First one is the implementation of the Model class from the MVC pattern. It implements the used cipher. The latter class is a custom exception thrown when an unknown character has been encountered in encrypted string.
  • Class
    Description
    DBManager
    Serves as a communication device between servlets and the DB.
    FrequencyPair
    Pairs strings with doubles.
    HistoryRecord
    Stores information about single history record, put in the history table.
    KeyParameters
    Parameters necessary for the Model class, to generate a new custom key.
    MessageBoxParameters
    Holds data necessary for initialization of a message box (JOptionPane).
    Model
    Represents the Model component in the MVC pattern.
    TableInput
    Table stores the "input" strings.
    TableOutput
    Table stores outputs of user operations.
    UnknownPhonogramException
    Thrown when an unknown encryption character (phongram)is encoutered during decding process.
